options.systemMessage:
=#Role: You are a helpful assistant whose role is to give top 5 keywords a client has ranked for.

#Intruction: 
- You have been given results of 10 keywords.
- Gop through each of the 10 keywords.
- Then give Top 5 keywords that a client ranked for the exact ranking position.

Output Format:

Keyword 1 - Rank
Keyword 2 - Rank
Keyword 3 - Rank
Keyword 4 - Rank
Keyword 5 - Rank

Give output in list format.

parameters.customBody:
={
    "city": "{{ $('Loop Over Clients').item.json['City Name'] }}",
    "countryCode": "{{ $json.CountryCode }}",
    "includeWebResults": false,
    "language": "en",
    "maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch": 20,
    "maxImages": 0,
    "maximumLeadsEnrichmentRecords": 0,
    "scrapeContacts": false,
    "scrapeDirectories": false,
    "scrapeImageAuthors": false,
    "scrapePlaceDetailPage": false,
    "scrapeReviewsPersonalData": true,
    "scrapeTableReservationProvider": false,
    "searchStringsArray": [
        "{{ $('Loop Over Keywords').item.json.keyword }}"
    ],
    "skipClosedPlaces": false
}

nodes.name: Run an Actor and get dataset

parameters.jsCode:
const countryName = $('Loop Over Clients').first().json.Country
  ?.toString()
  .trim()
  .toLowerCase();

const countryMap = {
  "india": "in",
  "united states": "us",
  "usa": "us",
  "united kingdom": "gb",
  "uk": "gb",
  "canada": "ca",
  "australia": "au",
  "germany": "de",
  "france": "fr",
  "spain": "es",
  "italy": "it",
  "netherlands": "nl",
  "singapore": "sg",
  "uae": "ae",
  "united arab emirates": "ae",
  "bahrain": "bh",
  "saudi arabia": "sa",
  "south africa": "za",
  "bangladesh": "bd",
  "pakistan": "pk",
  "sri lanka": "lk",
  "nepal": "np",
  "malaysia": "my",
  "indonesia": "id",
  "philippines": "ph",
  "japan": "jp",
  "china": "cn"
};

// return null when not found
const countryCode = countryMap[countryName] ?? null;

return [
  {
    json: {
      Country: countryName || null,
      CountryCode: countryCode
    }
  }
];

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  profile_name AS "Profile Name", 
  keyword AS "Keyword", 
  ranking_position AS "Ranking Position", 
  reviews AS "Reviews", 
  rating AS "Rating", 
  location AS "Location",
  audited_date AS "Audited Date"
FROM 
  dr_smart.gmb_audits 
WHERE 
  profile_name = '{{ $('Loop Over Clients').last().json['Client Name'] }}'
  -- Matching your Schedule Trigger output keys: Year, Month, and Day of month
  AND audited_date = TO_DATE(
    '{{ $('Schedule Trigger').first().json['Day of month'] }}-{{ $('Schedule Trigger').first().json['Month'] }}-{{ $('Schedule Trigger').first().json['Year'] }}', 
    'DD-Month-YYYY'
  )
ORDER BY 
  created_at DESC;

SELECT id, client_id, client_name AS "Client Name", dr_name AS "Dr Name", specialisation AS "Specialisation", primary_keyword AS "Primary Keyword", seo_keywords AS "SEO Keywords", city_name AS "City Name", country AS "Country", gmb_place_id AS "GMB Place ID", client_reporting_sheet AS "Client Reporting Sheet", contact_number AS "Contact Number", whatsapp AS "WhatsApp" FROM dr_smart.clients ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO dr_smart.workflow_error_logs (
    workflow_id, 
    workflow_name, 
    node_name, 
    error_message, 
    execution_id
) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5);

INSERT INTO dr_smart.workflow_error_logs (
    workflow_id, 
    workflow_name, 
    node_name, 
    error_message, 
    execution_id
) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5);

INSERT INTO dr_smart.client_reports (
  profile_name, unique_profile_name, start_date, end_date, 
  ratings, reviews, review_responses, 
  keyword_1, rank_1, keyword_2, rank_2, 
  keyword_3, rank_3, keyword_4, rank_4, 
  keyword_5, rank_5
) 
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Edit Fields').last().json['Client Name'] }}', 
  '{{ $('Edit Fields').last().json['Client Name'] }}{{ $('Start and End Date').first().json.StartDay }}/{{ $('Start and End Date').first().json.StartMonth }}/{{ $('Start and End Date').first().json.StartYear }}', 
  '{{ $('Start and End Date').first().json.StartYear }}-{{ $('Start and End Date').first().json.StartMonth }}-{{ $('Start and End Date').first().json.StartDay }}'::date, 
  '{{ $('Start and End Date').first().json.EndYear }}-{{ $('Start and End Date').first().json.EndMonth }}-{{ $('Start and End Date').first().json.EndDay }}'::date, 
  {{ $('Merge').item.json.rating || 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $('Merge').item.json.review || 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $('Merge').item.json.review || 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $json.keywords[0] ? "'" + $json.keywords[0] + "'" : 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $json.ranks[0] || 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $json.keywords[1] ? "'" + $json.keywords[1] + "'" : 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $json.ranks[1] || 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $json.keywords[2] ? "'" + $json.keywords[2] + "'" : 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $json.ranks[2] || 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $json.keywords[3] ? "'" + $json.keywords[3] + "'" : 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $json.ranks[3] || 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $json.keywords[4] ? "'" + $json.keywords[4] + "'" : 'NULL' }}, 
  {{ $json.ranks[4] || 'NULL' }}
)
ON CONFLICT (unique_profile_name) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  profile_name = EXCLUDED.profile_name,
  start_date = EXCLUDED.start_date,
  end_date = EXCLUDED.end_date,
  ratings = EXCLUDED.ratings,
  reviews = EXCLUDED.reviews,
  review_responses = EXCLUDED.review_responses,
  keyword_1 = EXCLUDED.keyword_1,
  rank_1 = EXCLUDED.rank_1,
  keyword_2 = EXCLUDED.keyword_2,
  rank_2 = EXCLUDED.rank_2,
  keyword_3 = EXCLUDED.keyword_3,
  rank_3 = EXCLUDED.rank_3,
  keyword_4 = EXCLUDED.keyword_4,
  rank_4 = EXCLUDED.rank_4,
  keyword_5 = EXCLUDED.keyword_5,
  rank_5 = EXCLUDED.rank_5;

SELECT 
  c.id, 
  c.client_id, 
  c.client_name AS "Client Name", 
  c.dr_name AS "Dr Name", 
  c.specialisation AS "Specialisation", 
  c.primary_keyword AS "Primary Keyword", 
  c.seo_keywords AS "SEO Keywords", 
  c.city_name AS "City Name", 
  c.country AS "Country", 
  c.gmb_place_id AS "GMB Place ID", 
  c.client_reporting_sheet AS "Client Reporting Sheet", 
  c.contact_number AS "Contact Number", 
  c.whatsapp AS "WhatsApp",
  cr.ratings AS "Ratings", 
  cr.reviews AS "Reviews",
  cr.start_date AS "Report Start Date"
FROM 
  dr_smart.clients c
LEFT JOIN 
  dr_smart.client_reports cr 
ON 
  c.client_name = cr.profile_name 
  -- This ensures we are only checking the report for the month your workflow just ran
  AND cr.start_date = '{{ $('Start and End Date1').first().json.StartYear }}-{{ $('Start and End Date1').first().json.StartMonth }}-{{ $('Start and End Date1').first().json.StartDay }}'::date
WHERE 
  (cr.ratings IS NULL OR cr.ratings = 0)
  OR (cr.reviews IS NULL OR cr.reviews = 0)
  OR cr.profile_name IS NULL
ORDER BY 
  c.id;

main.node: Run an Actor and get dataset
